series_metadata.series_description: Electronic files pertaining to the Ohio Peace Officer Training classes conducted by the OSHP Training Academy according to the Ohio Peace OfficerTraining Academy (OPOTA) Standards. The files include the roster of basic trainees on the first day of class, the final roster before graduation, the roster of trainees who graduate, the final OPOTA exam scores, and the OPOTA curriculum to the particular class.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Paper files are destroyed upon scanning. ; Electronic: in electronic files thirty (30) years from date of graduation
